CreateQuery.description: Grants permission to create a VPC reachability query

ExtendQuery.description: Grants permission to extend a VPC reachability query to include the calling principals account

GetQueryAnswer.description: Grants permission to get VPC reachability query answers

GetQueryExplanation.description: Grants permission to get VPC reachability query explanations

GetQueryExtensionAccounts.description: Grants permission to list accounts that might be useful in a new query
